entities.name: WINTER OILSEED RAPE
entities.description: A crop characterized by low nitrogen use efficiency and subject to site-specific production limitations in northern Germany

entities.name: NITROGEN USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which winter oilseed rape utilizes nitrogen

entities.name: CROP MODELLING
entities.description: An analytical approach used to define site-specific fertiliser strategies and explore production limitations

entities.name: FIELD TRIALS
entities.description: Empirical studies used to define site-specific fertiliser strategies

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The goal of improving crop production through optimized fertiliser strategies

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: An environmental factor that interacts with nitrogen to limit plant growth

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A nutrient that interacts with water to limit plant growth

entities.name: APSIM CANOLA MODEL
entities.description: A growth simulation model originally developed for Australia and adapted for Germany

entities.name: GERMANY
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: TOTAL BIOMASS
entities.description: A measured growth parameter used to test the APSIM canola model

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A measured growth parameter and target for fertiliser rates

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A measured growth parameter used to test the APSIM canola model

entities.name: N-UPTAKE
entities.description: A measured parameter indicating the amount of nitrogen absorbed by the plant

entities.name: SOIL MINERAL N
entities.description: A measured soil parameter used to test the APSIM canola model

entities.name: GÖTTINGEN
entities.description: A city in northern Germany where study sites were located

entities.name: NORTHERN GERMANY
entities.description: The specific region of Germany where the study was conducted

entities.name: CLIMATE
entities.description: An environmental factor influencing production limitations

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: An environmental factor influencing production limitations

entities.name: N-FERTILISER RATE
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen fertiliser applied to the crop

entities.name: YIELD TARGETS
entities.description: The desired grain yield levels used to match fertiliser rates

entities.name: WEATHER DATA
entities.description: Historical climatic data used in simulation experiments

entities.name: LOAMY SOIL
entities.description: A specific soil type used in the simulation experiment

entities.name: ROOTING DEPTHS
entities.description: The depth to which plant roots penetrate, affecting water and nitrogen access

entities.name: PLANT AVAILABLE WATER CAPACITIES
entities.description: The amount of water available to the plant, implicated by rooting depths

entities.name: N-BALANCE
entities.description: The difference between nitrogen input and output in the crop system

entities.name: CONTINENTAL CLIMATE
entities.description: A climate type that results in lower simulated yields for high N-fertiliser rates

entities.name: COAST
entities.description: A region with different rainfall patterns and higher simulated yields

entities.name: RAINFALL PATTERNS
entities.description: Climatic variations that influence simulated yields

entities.name: WATER SUPPLY
entities.description: A critical factor for maintaining high nitrogen use efficiency and reaching grain yield targets
